final:
module ALU (
    input [63:0] obf_A,
    input [63:0] B,
    input [2:0] op_code,
    output reg [63:0] result
);
    always @(*) begin
        case (op_code)
            3'b000: result = obf_A + B;          // Addition
            3'b001: result = obf_A - B;          // Subtraction
            3'b010: result = obf_A & B;          // AND
            3'b011: result = obf_A | B;          // OR
            3'b100: result = obf_A ^ B;          // XOR
            3'b101: result = obf_A + 1;          // Increment
            3'b110: result = obf_A - 1;          // Decrement
            3'b111: result = obf_A;              // Pass-through
            default: result = 64'b0;         // Default case
        endcase
    end
endmodule
